title: Settings
passwordHint: Leave blank to keep your password
languageHint: App language for menus, feed, settings, and more
subscriptionBody: Social feed is free. Pro unlocks food logging, plans, scanners, and analytics.
emailChangeBody: Change your email to {{email}}? You'll use this address to sign in.
passwordChangeBody: Update your password? This is a demo change and is not synced to a real auth server.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.intro: Choose which updates you want on this device. Demo preferences are stored locally.
notifications.commentsHint: Replies and mentions on your posts
notifications.storiesHint: Reactions and replies to your stories

privacyPage.title: Account Privacy
privacyPage.visibilityHint: Private accounts require follow approval before others see your workouts.
privacyPage.blockedEmpty: You haven't blocked anyone. You can block athletes from their profile menu.
privacyPage.reportsBody: To report a post or athlete, open their profile or post and use the menu.
privacyPage.reportsBodyLong: To report a post or athlete, open their profile or post and use the menu. Reports are reviewed by Evolve support in production builds.

help.title: Help & Support
help.intro: Need a hand? Browse common questions or email the Evolve team.

faqItems.q: How do I make my account private?
faqItems.a: Open Edit profile (or Profile → ⋮ → Account Privacy), then choose Private.

faqItems.q: Where do I change language or appearance?
faqItems.a: Profile → ⋮ → Preferences. Language, measurement, appearance, security, and subscription live there.
Profile → ⋮ → Saved Posts. Bookmark any post from the feed to add it there.

faqItems.q: How do dual camera stories work?
faqItems.a: From Feed, tap Your story. On devices with front and rear cameras, Evolve captures both in one moment.

faqItems.q: What's included in Free vs Pro?
faqItems.a: Feed, social, and posting are free. Pro unlocks food logging, training plans, scanners, and deeper analytics.

about.title: About
about.body: Evolve is a fitness network for athletes who train in public — share workouts, dual-camera stories, and stay accountable with the people who push you.
about.tagline: Made for athletes. Built with intention.

photoHint: Tap the + to add or change your photo

health.title: Health integrations
health.subtitle: Connect Apple Health or Garmin Connect to sync steps, workouts, and recovery into Evolve Pro.
health.syncHint: Turn categories on or off without disconnecting.

sync.stepsBody: Daily step count and move totals.
sync.recoveryBody: Sleep, heart rate, and recovery metrics when available.

apple.title: Apple Health
apple.body: Sync from the Health app on iPhone. Connect once, then choose what Evolve can read.

garmin.title: Garmin Connect
garmin.body: Pull activities from your Garmin watch and Connect account into Evolve.

health.webNote: Full native sync ships with the mobile app. This screen saves your Pro connection preferences for demo.
